<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Reset
action(['ACTION7'])

# Try MOUSE at yellow L center (47, 10)
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 47, 'col': 10}])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("After MOUSE(47,10):")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] > 10 and n['color'] in ['c', 'B', 'Y', 'S']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=[{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}]")

# Now try SPACE
action(['SPACE'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nAfter SPACE:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] > 10 and n['color'] in ['c', 'B', 'Y', 'S']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=[{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}]")
print("Level completed?", last_action_result.get('level_completed'))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
